items.title: Humanoid developer Agility Robotics rebrands
items.summary: The company said the rebrand reflects its readiness to scale deployments and lead humanoid adoption across new industries. The post Humanoid developer Agility Robotics rebrands appeared first on The Robot Report .

items.title: Plug-and-Play AI: Transforming robotics with modular skills
items.summary: Our guest this week is Dinesh Narayanan, Head of Commercialization, General Robotics. The post Plug-and-Play AI: Transforming robotics with modular skills appeared first on The Robot Report .

items.title: Simbe Tally shelf-scanning robot achieves UL 3300 certification
items.summary: As part of the UL 3300 evaluation, Tally passed more than 40 safety tests, demonstrating its ability to operate safely in retail settings. The post Simbe Tally shelf-scanning robot achieves UL 3300 certification appeared first on The Robot Report .

items.title: Vicarious Surgical faces NYSE delisting again
items.summary: Vicarious Surgical faces NYSE delisting after its market capitalization fell below the required $15 million threshold. The post Vicarious Surgical faces NYSE delisting again appeared first on The Robot Report .

items.title: 11 women shaping the future of robotics
items.summary: The IFR said it hopes the list will give women in the robotics industry more visibility and acknowledgment. The post 11 women shaping the future of robotics appeared first on The Robot Report .

items.title: Tesollo and Techman Robot unveil robot for high-mix, low-volume production
items.summary: Tesollo demonstrated its DG-3F-M articulated gripper with Techman's TM5S cobot arm for tasks such as bin picking and assembly. The post Tesollo and Techman Robot unveil robot for high-mix, low-volume production appeared first on The Robot Report .

items.title: Dexterity unveils Foresight world model for truck loading
items.summary: Foresight is Dexterity's physics-consistent world model, a real-time, transactable representation of the physical environment. The post Dexterity unveils Foresight world model for truck loading appeared first on The Robot Report .

items.title: MassRobotics resident startups surpass $2B in funding
items.summary: MassRobotics' mission is to help create and scale the next generation of successful robotics and physical AI companies. The post MassRobotics resident startups surpass $2B in funding appeared first on The Robot Report .

items.title: AW 2026 features Korea humanoid debuts as industry seeks digital transformation
items.summary: In addition to humanoid robots from Agibot, Boston Dynamics, Leju, and Unitree, AW 2026 showed opportunities for physical AI in South Korea. The post AW 2026 features Korea humanoid debuts as industry seeks digital transformation appeared first on The Robot Report .

items.title: Noble Machines exits stealth with Moby humanoid
items.summary: Noble Machines said it already shipped AI-driven humanoids robots to a Fortune Global 500 customer within 18 months of launch. The post Noble Machines exits stealth with Moby humanoid appeared first on The Robot Report .

items.title: Waymo robotaxi fails to stop for school bus in Austin
items.summary: A remote human error led a Waymo robotaxi to illegally pass an Austin school bus, sparking a federal investigation. The post Waymo robotaxi fails to stop for school bus in Austin appeared first on The Robot Report .

items.title: HEBI wins NASA SBIR to build space robot actuators
items.summary: NASA can use space-rated actuation hardware for a wide range of applications, including in robotic arms that deploy equipment. The post HEBI wins NASA SBIR to build space robot actuators appeared first on The Robot Report .

items.title: NORD adds 112 frame size to IE5+ synchronous motor line
items.summary: NORD offers IE5+ motors in sizes 71, 90, and newly released, size 112, extending the power range from 0.5 to 15.0 hp. The post NORD adds 112 frame size to IE5+ synchronous motor line appeared first on The Robot Report .

items.title: Intuitive buys European surgical robot distributors
items.summary: Intuitive said more than 470 da Vinci surgical robots were installed in Italy, Spain and Portugal as of Dec. 31, 2025. The post Intuitive buys European surgical robot distributors appeared first on The Robot Report .

items.title: 6 lessons I learned watching a robotics startup die from the inside
items.summary: After a year as COO of K-Scale Labs, Rui Xu reflects on the hard lessons behind the collapse of its low-cost humanoid robot ambitions — from overreliance on AI to the unforgiving realities of hardware, supply chains, and rushed timelines. The post 6 lessons I learned watching a robotics startup die from the inside appeared first on The Robot Report .
